---
name: Question / Help Request
about: Ask a question or request help using the project
title: ''
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

**Before you ask:**
1. Have you checked the `README.md` and any existing documentation?
2. Have you searched [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/aguo890/Job-Automation-Suite/discussions) (or past issues) to see if this has been answered before?

**Question:**
Please describe your question or what you need help with in detail.

**Context:**
If you're asking about an error or unexpected behavior (that isn't a confirmed bug), please share the steps to reproduce the situation and your current environment setup.

**(Note: We encourage using GitHub Discussions for questions if enabled on the repository. This keeps the issue tracker clean for actionable development tasks.)**
